result.stdout:
Description:
  C2CS - C to C# bindings code generator.

Usage:
  c2cs.Tool [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  library   Build a C library for the purposes of FFI (foreign function interface) with other languages such as C#.
  generate  Generate C# code from a cross-platform abstract syntax tree (AST) '.json' file.

commands.payload:
Description:
  C2CS - C to C# bindings code generator.

Usage:
  c2cs.Tool [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  library   Build a C library for the purposes of FFI (foreign function interface) with other languages such as C#.
  generate  Generate C# code from a cross-platform abstract syntax tree (AST) '.json' file.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate C# code from a cross-platform abstract syntax tree (AST) '.json' file.

Usage:
  c2cs.Tool generate [options]

Options:
  --config <config>  The file path configure C# bindgen. [default: config.json]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate C# code from a cross-platform abstract syntax tree (AST) '.json' file.

Usage:
  c2cs.Tool generate [options]

Options:
  --config <config>  The file path configure C# bindgen. [default: config.json]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Build a C library for the purposes of FFI (foreign function interface) with other languages such as C#.

Usage:
  c2cs.Tool library [options]

Options:
  --config <config>                    The file path configure C# bindgen. [default: config.json]
  --cmake-arguments <cmake-arguments>  CMake arguments provided on command line instead of in the configuration file.
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

Usage:

  --cmake-arguments <cmake-arguments>  CMake arguments provided on command line instead of in the configuration file.
